'''chathusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:waddie|waddie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waddie|waddie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chathusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthisith|chæthisith]] || [[word:chæthisij|chæthisij]] || [[word:chæthisish|chæthisish]] || [[word:chæthisi|chæthisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathuthusuth|chathuthusuth]] || [[word:chathuthusuj|chathuthusuj]] || [[word:chathuthusush|chathuthusush]] || [[word:chathuthusu|chathuthusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathusuth|chathusuth]] || [[word:chathusuj|chathusuj]] || [[word:chathusush|chathusush]] || [[word:chathusu|chathusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathufsuth|chathufsuth]] || [[word:chathufsuj|chathufsuj]] || [[word:chathufsush|chathufsush]] || [[word:chathufsuf|chathufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathusuthu|chathusuthu]] || [[word:chathusuju|chathusuju]] || [[word:chathusushu|chathusushu]] || [[word:chathusuku|chathusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathusuth|chathusuth]] || [[word:chathusuj|chathusuj]] || [[word:chathusush|chathusush]] || [[word:chathusu|chathusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathusuthul|chathusuthul]] || [[word:chathusujul|chathusujul]] || [[word:chathusushul|chathusushul]] || [[word:chathusukul|chathusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathusuthuthu|chathusuthuthu]] || [[word:chathusujuju|chathusujuju]] || [[word:chathusushushu|chathusushushu]] || [[word:chathusuku|chathusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathusuthun|chathusuthun]] || [[word:chathusujun|chathusujun]] || [[word:chathusushun|chathusushun]] || [[word:chathusukun|chathusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathusuthuoro|chathusuthuoro]] || [[word:chathusujuoro|chathusujuoro]] || [[word:chathusushuoro|chathusushuoro]] || [[word:chathusukuoro|chathusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
